title: Teacher Professor
description: A Teacher Professor in Arts in India teaches various subjects like History, Geography, and Languages to students in colleges and universities. They also conduct research, prepare course materials, and assess student performance. Their daily tasks involve lecturing, grading assignments, and attending departmental meetings.
top_private_colleges: Birla Institute of Technology and Science

career_progression.year_0_2: Assistant Professor in a college, teaching and conducting research
career_progression.year_3_5: Senior Lecturer in a university, with additional administrative responsibilities
career_progression.year_6_10: Associate Professor in a top university, with a strong research focus
career_progression.entrepreneurship_exit: Starting a private educational institution or online course platform
career_progression.global_pathway: Teaching English as a Foreign Language (TEFL) or pursuing a Ph.D. abroad

india_social_context.first_year_reality: Starting salary is low, but opportunities for growth are available
common_misconceptions: You can earn a lot of money as a Teacher Professor
